name: Sugar Free Chocolate Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Crust:
- Mix 6 tablespoons (tbsp) peanut butter with 1 tablespoon (tbsp) honey.
- Gradually add 2 cups rice crispies and combine thoroughly.
- Press the mixture into a pie plate using a metal spoon, building up the edge.
Filling:
- Slice the bananas over the crust.
- In a separate bowl, mix the pudding with milk until smooth.
- Spread the pudding mixture over the bananas.
- Top with 1 cup Cool Whip light.
Use sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix.
